posts.title: Building a Custom Checkout Experience with LiqPay's Payment API
posts.author: Arthur C. Codex
posts.description: A comprehensive guide to implementing a production-ready payment checkout using LiqPay's Payment API, focusing on creating seamless user experiences while maintaining security standards appropriate for financial transactions.

posts.title: Implementing Secure Payment Processing with LiqPay API
posts.author: Arthur C. Codex
posts.description: A technical guide for developers on integrating LiqPay's payment gateway with emphasis on security best practices and production-ready PHP implementation, covering PCI DSS compliance, 3D Secure authentication, fraud detection, and multi-currency support.

posts.title: Handling Payment Notifications and Webhooks with LiqPay API
posts.author: Arthur C. Codex
posts.description: A comprehensive guide to implementing secure webhook handling for LiqPay payment gateway, covering real-time transaction notifications, signature verification, idempotency patterns, and production-ready code examples.

posts.title: Managing Recurring Payments and Subscriptions using LiqPay API
posts.author: Arthur C. Codex
posts.description: A comprehensive guide for implementing subscription-based billing through LiqPay's payment API, covering token-based recurring payment setup, webhook handling, subscription monitoring, cancellation flows, infrastructure scaling, and PCI compliance.
